name: Iowa Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Iowa - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Iowa Board of Dietetics
provider.parentOrganization: Department of Inspections, Appeals, and Licensing (DIAL)

address.description: Iowa Department of Health and Human Services, Board of Dietetic Examiners, Lucas State Office Building, 321 E 12th St, Des Moines, IA 50319-0075

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Verification
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

requiredDocuments.name: Official Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Sent directly to the Board showing your conferred degree.

requiredDocuments.name: Verification of Lawful Presence
requiredDocuments.description: Documentation satisfying the SAVE program requirements for state licensure.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does an Iowa dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial cost is a nonrefundable $120 application fee.

mainEntity.name: When does the Iowa license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Iowa dietitian license is renewed biennially (every two years). The renewal fee is $120. A late fee of $60 is applied if renewed after the expiration date.

mainEntity.name: What are the continuing education requirements for Iowa?

acceptedAnswer.text: Iowa requires 30 hours of dietetics-related continuing education (CE) during each two-year renewal cycle. First-time licensees are exempt from this requirement for their initial renewal.

mainEntity.name: Does Iowa have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: Iowa has enacted the Dietitian Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, dietitians still apply by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Iowa?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 3 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Iowa while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most applicants need to wait for full approval before starting work because the state does not clearly offer a temporary or provisional credential.
